faqs.question: Do you ship?
faqs.answer: Yes! We ship anywhere in the US 📦 Shipping costs $10 and takes 3-5 business days.

faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: 3 to 5 business days anywhere in the US. If you're in Miami we also offer local delivery for $10 — we call you as soon as it arrives!

faqs.question: Do you deliver in Miami?
faqs.answer: Yes! We do local delivery in Miami for $10. We'll need your address and phone number so we can call you when the delivery arrives.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept Zelle, CashApp, and credit/debit cards. Note: card payments have a 7% processing fee.

faqs.question: Do you offer wholesale prices?
faqs.answer: Yes! We have special prices for bulk orders. Send us a message with what you need and we'll give you the best deal.

faqs.question: Do you give discounts to returning customers?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We take care of our loyal customers. The more you shop with us, the better the deal we can offer you.

faqs.question: How can I pay?
faqs.answer: You can pay via Zelle, CashApp, or card (7% fee applies for card payments).

faqs.question: Where are you located?
faqs.answer: We're based in Miami, FL. We ship anywhere in the US and offer local delivery in Miami for $10.

faqs.question: What's your phone number?
faqs.answer: You can reach us at (786) 829-3674 or right here through chat — whichever works best for you!

faqs.question: ¿Hacen envíos?
faqs.answer: ¡Sí! Enviamos a todo Estados Unidos 📦 El envío cuesta $10 y tarda de 3 a 5 días hábiles.

faqs.question: ¿Hacen delivery en Miami?
faqs.answer: ¡Sí! Hacemos delivery en Miami por $10. Necesitamos tu dirección y número de teléfono para llamarte cuando llegue el delivery.

faqs.question: ¿Qué métodos de pago aceptan?
faqs.answer: Aceptamos Zelle, CashApp y tarjetas de crédito/débito. Las tarjetas tienen un cargo adicional del 7%.

faqs.question: ¿Tienen precios al mayor?
faqs.answer: ¡Claro! Tenemos precios especiales para compras al mayor. Escríbenos con lo que necesitas y te damos el mejor precio.

faqs.question: ¿Cuánto cuesta el envío?
faqs.answer: El envío a cualquier parte de Estados Unidos cuesta $10 y llega en 3 a 5 días hábiles.

faqs.question: ¿Cuál es su número de teléfono?
faqs.answer: Puedes contactarnos al (786) 829-3674 o aquí mismo por chat, como prefieras.
